name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a tiger and a girl playing baseball. The main character was little girl and tiger, tiger and girl playing outside. The mood was happy.

The story begins:


 "On one occasion the girls were looking for some balls to throw at an imaginary friend who had just returned from heaven by way in town."
